task: A3-1: additive ledger columns on driver_finance.driver_settlement_deductions (the KEEP ledger). Adds remaining_balance_cents bigint (NULLABLE, no default — required by zero-behavior-change; A3-2 owns NULL handling) and status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' with CHECK IN ('pending','partial','applied','deferred') (text+CHECK per repo convention, NOT a pg ENUM), plus invariant CHECK chk_dsd_remaining_range (remaining NULL or 0..amount_cents). Backfill (idempotent, IS NULL-guarded, no hardcoded UUIDs): unconsumed (applied_to_settlement_id IS NULL) -> status='pending', remaining_balance_cents=amount_cents; consumed -> status='applied', remaining_balance_cents=0. ZERO recovery-behavior change — columns only, consumed by A3-2. Tracker A3-1 row + Next-Blocks A3 split appended to this same PR once #924 (tracker) merges.
